facts_promoted.fact: Hilton Advance Purchase Program: optional, 4.5% fee on advance payments, includes digital payment option (Google Pay, Apple Pay) via Adyen
Strategic Partnerships with SLH, AutoCamp, Evermore Resort, Field Station — these are 'Other Businesses' that may operate in franchisee's area including Restricted Area
RMCC revenue management support is mandatory for first-time luxury franchise owners (Category 2 Premier Level 2, minimum 12 months, $4,179-$15,709/month)
HSM revenues from all-brand franchisees in 2024: $19.6M rebates, $8.8M goods/services, $38.7M admin fees
Hilton affiliate holds non-controlling equity interest in Groups360 LLC (group events vendor); may receive pro-rata distributions
Restaurant Brands (StiR Creative Collective): 8 brands available under other Hilton brands but NOT offered for LXR
Condemnation/casualty termination: No termination fee if (a) condemnation, or (b) casualty where franchisee elects not to rebuild AND does not operate competing hotel at site within 3 years
Anti-corruption clause: Development incentive may not be used for Improper Payments or violations of Anti-Corruption Laws; franchisor has inspection rights
